query:
-- First, verify the user exists and get their ID
SELECT id, name, email, role FROM users WHERE email = 'ah.fuadh@gmail.com';

-- Get or create admin staff role
SELECT id FROM staffRoles WHERE name = 'admin' LIMIT 1;

-- If staff record doesn't exist, create it
INSERT INTO staff (userId, roleId, department, position, isActive, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT u.id, sr.id, 'Management', 'Admin', 1, NOW(), NOW()
FROM users u, staffRoles sr
WHERE u.email = 'ah.fuadh@gmail.com' 
  AND sr.name = 'admin'
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM staff WHERE userId = u.id
  )
LIMIT 1;

-- Verify the staff record was created
SELECT s.id, u.name, u.email, sr.name as role, s.department, s.position, s.isActive
FROM staff s
JOIN users u ON s.userId = u.id
JOIN staffRoles sr ON s.roleId = sr.id
WHERE u.email = 'ah.fuadh@gmail.com';
